channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Chicago brings losing streak into matchup with Dallas
item.description: Dallas Stars (20-13-1, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (12-22-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Sunday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks look to break their three-game skid when they play the Dallas Stars.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Corbin Burnes and Arizona Diamondbacks agree to $210 million, 6-year deal, AP source says
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Corbin Burnes and the Arizona Diamondbacks have agreed to a $210 million, six-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press late Friday night. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity because the deal was pending a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Jose Sharks find new way to blow third period lead
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks start homestand with bitter loss to Vegas Golden Knights; face Calgary Flames on Saturday
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Latvia stuns Canada in world junior hockey, winning 3-2 on lone shootout goal
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Eriks Mateiko scored the lone goal of a shootout in the eighth round to give Latvia a 3-2 victory over Canada on Friday night in the world junior hockey championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Taylen Green leads Arkansas to 39-26 victory over Texas Tech in the Liberty Bowl
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Taylen Green threw for 341 yards and two touchdowns and ran for 81 yards in Arkansas' 39-26 victory over Texas Tech on Friday night in the Liberty Bowl. Green completed 11 of 21 passes and Arkansas (7-6) had 573 yards of total offense.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mets and pitcher Sean Manaea finalize $75 million, 3-year deal
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Sean Manaea and the New York Mets finalized a $75 million, three-year contract Friday night that keeps one of the team's best pitchers last season at the front of a remodeled rotation. The sides agreed to terms earlier this week, subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: McCord throws for 453 yards, 5 TDs in No. 22 Syracuse's 52-35 Holiday Bowl win over Washington State
item.description: Kyle McCord threw for 453 yards and five touchdowns to break Deshaun Watson’s Atlantic Coast Conference season passing record and lead No. 22 Syracuse to a 52-35 victory over depleted-yet-scrappy Washington State in the Holiday Bowl on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Bernie Wilson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Kings fire coach Mike Brown less than halfway through his 3rd season
item.description: The Sacramento Kings have fired coach Mike Brown less than halfway through his third season with the team mired in a five-game losing streak. General manager Monte McNair called the move Friday a “difficult decision” and thanked Brown for his work.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Stars forward Mason Marchment taken to hospital after getting hit in face by puck
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Stars forward Mason Marchment was helped off the ice during Friday night’s game against the Minnesota Wild and taken to a hospital after being hit in the face by a puck. Dallas coach Pete DeBoer said Marchment is OK, but was not sure how long he’ll be sidelined.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Syracuse's Kyle McCord breaks Deshaun Watson's ACC season passing yards record
item.description: Kyle McCord broke Deshaun Watson’s Atlantic Coast Conference season passing yards record on a 50-yard completion to Darrell Gill Jr. on No. 22 Syracuse’s first play of the second half in a 52-35 Holiday Bowl victory overt Washington State on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Shaq Barrett expected to re-sign with Bucs after being waived by Dolphins, reports say
item.description: Former Tampa Bay Buccaneers linebacker Shaq Barrett is expected to once again sign with the Bucs after he was waived by the Miami Dolphins, according to multiple reports.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tuch scores hat trick, Sabres beat Blackhawks 6-2 for 2nd straight win after 13-game skid
item.description: Alex Tuch scored a hat trick for the Buffalo Sabres in a 6-2 win against the Chicago Blackhawks on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 2 sailor deaths result in muted celebrations on winning yacht in Sydney to Hobart race
item.description: Champagne corks often pop and loud, boisterous cheers are usually heard around Constitution Dock when the Sydney to Hobart line honors winner finishes in the Tasmanian state capital.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Passa, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Sportscaster Greg Gumbel dies from cancer at age 78
item.description: Greg Gumbel, a longtime CBS sportscaster who broke barriers during his career calling some of the biggest sporting events, has died from cancer, according to a statement from family released by the network on Friday. He was 78.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Column: The path of Matthew Stafford looms for Caleb Williams
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — A skilled quarterback burdened by the dysfunction of his organization, doomed to toil in mediocrity for over a decade despite a high level of performance year in and year out.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: NBA legend Isiah Thomas thankful for 'prayers and the love' amid private battle with Bell's palsy
item.description: Basketball Hall of Famer Isiah Thomas publicly revealed his health condition during a recent appearance on the "Come And Talk 2 Me" podcast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NBA star Jimmy Butler to remain sidelined due to illness, according to Heat
item.description: Jimmy Butler has become synonymous with Heat basketball over his six seasons in Miami, but an illness has kept the star off the court several days.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Miami basketball coach Jim Larrañaga left 'exhausted' by NIL's impact on college sports
item.description: The longtime Hurricanes coach said his decision to abruptly step down from his position was partly due to his lack of interest in contending with NIL.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sources: Basketball star Jalen Stokes wins appeal, granted eligibility at Dougherty Valley
item.description: Dougherty Valley basketball player Jalen Stokes could make his debut on Friday night in Santa Barbara
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: NBA coaches react with dismay over firing of 2-time coach of the year Mike Brown
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Not even two years ago, Rick Carlisle publicly lauded Mike Brown for the job he did on the way to winning the NBA's coach of the year award. And on Friday, Carlisle was among the coaches reacting with dismay that Brown was fired.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mavs star Luka Doncic will be out about a month before check on calf injury, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Dallas Mavericks superstar Luka Doncic will be out about a month before being re-evaluated for a calf injury sustained in a Christmas Day loss to Minnesota, a person with knowledge of the injury said Friday.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers agree to new deal with Teoscar Hernández: report
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers fans will need to stock up on sunflower seeds after the team agreed to a new deal with fan favorite slugger Teoscar Hernández. Hernández will return to the Dodgers on a new 3-year, $66 million deal, according to ESPN's Jeff Passan.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Sportscaster Greg Gumbel dead from cancer at 78
item.description: David Berson, president and CEO of CBS Sports, described Gumbel as breaking barriers and setting standards for others during his years as a voice for fans in sports, including in the NFL and March Madness.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Sportscasting icon Greg Gumbel dies at 78
item.description: Sportscaster Greg Gumbel, best known for his long career with CBS Sports, has died Friday, Dec. 27, according to CBS Sports and Gumbel's family.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Longtime sports anchor, announcer Greg Gumbel dies at 78
item.description: Longtime announcer and anchor Greg Gumbel, who called NFL games and was a CBS studio host for college basketball, has died at the age of 78.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Navy denies Oklahoma victory in Armed Forces Bowl after stopping late 2-point conversion
item.description: Navy held on to beat Oklahoma 21-20 in the Lockheed Martin Armed Forces Bowl Friday after its defense denied a late two-point conversion attempt.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Navy gets 95-yard TD run from Horvath and stops 2-point try to beat Oklahoma in Armed Forces Bowl
item.description: FORT WORTH, Texas (AP) — Blake Horvath set a Navy record with a 95-yard touchdown run and then scored a go-ahead 6-yarder with 4:34 left as the Midshipmen overcame an early two-touchdown deficit and stopped a late 2-point conversion attempt to beat Oklahoma 21-20 in the Armed Forces Bowl on Friday.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scottie Scheffler has surgery after injuring hand with broken glass, will miss first signature event of 2025
item.description: Scottie Scheffler's manager announced Friday the world's No. 1 player will miss The Sentry next week after injuring his hand with broken glass, requiring surgery.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles' Nick Sirianni clears the air after heated postgame confrontation with former player Zach Ertz
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles head coach Nick Sirianni said Thursday that he and former Eagles player Zach Ertz, now with the Washington Commanders, are all good after they got into a postgame confrontation following the Eagles' loss to the Commanders on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LeBron James trolled for saying Christmas belongs to NBA after NFL viewership is revealed
item.description: LeBron James declared Christmas "our day," but the NFL had nearly 20 million more viewers than the NBA throughout the holiday this week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles' Jalen Hurts still in concussion protocol, likely out vs Cowboys
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles head coach Nick Sirianni said it's going be "tough" for quarterback Jalen Hurts to play against the Dallas Cowboys, given where he is in the concussion protocol.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sarrazin to undergo surgery after head injury in crash in downhill training on 2026 Olympics slope
item.description: BORMIO, Italy (AP) — French standout Cyprien Sarrazin was in intensive care with a head injury and will undergo surgery after a crash during training for a World Cup downhill race on Friday on the slope set to be used for the 2026 Winter Olympics.
item.dc:creator: DANIELLA MATAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from organization in the coming days
item.description: (AP) -- Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from the organization after being the public face of the organization's planned move from Oakland to Las Vegas. Kaval has been president of the A's for the past eight years and will step down from the role on Dec.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Bulls take on the Bucks on 3-game skid
item.description: Milwaukee Bucks (16-13, fifth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (13-18, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago enters the matchup against Milwaukee after losing three straight games. The Bulls are 2-5 against division opponents.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers' Mookie Betts shares message to Yankees fans who tried to pry ball out of his glove in World Series
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers right fielder Mookie Betts revealed his message for the the Yankees fans who tried to pry the ball out of his glove during Game 4 of the World Series.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls blow 21 point lead in 141-133 loss to Atlanta
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Jalen Johnson had a career-high 30 points and the Atlanta Hawks rallied from a late 21-point deficit by scoring 50 points in the fourth quarter in a 141-133 win over the Chicago Bulls on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Aggies bounce back with 75-68 win over St. Mary's
item.description: MORAGA, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off its first loss of the season, the Utah State men’s basketball (11-1, 1-0 MW) got back in the win column Sunday night, closing out non-conference play with a 75-68 win over Saint Mary’s at the UCU Pavilion in Moraga.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
